text: We are hiring our first VP People Platform (People Data, AI, Ops, Total Rewards) to join our leadership team at Checkr, Inc. . It is a once in a lifetime opportunity to lead how we scale People through AI+Data transformation in a People Data Platform company! Open to senior operators with or without HR experience.

I think there's definitely a bubble for AI-only focused companies. Many of them are going to die. Some won't live up to those valuations and expectations. The ones I'm watching closely:

Companies with no clear product, no revenue, and crazy valuations. 

They're burning through cash to train models without clear problens they are solving for.

I'm not worried about Checkr in that scenario.

Vast majority of our revenue comes from real-world companies across real-world industries.

- Retail
- Transportation 
- Healthcare
- Automotive
- Manufacturing
- Small businesses

That's a very different position to be in when things start to correct.
The founders who burn out fastest are usually the ones with the biggest emotional swings.
I started Checkr as an engineer with no idea how to run a company.
Hyper growth is the best thing that can happen to your startup and it's also the most dangerous.
